creator: billf@mu.org
text:
On Wed, Oct 24, 2001 at 10:18:34AM -0700, State of Iowa wrote:

> >Description:
> Doing a new install of FreeBSD on a Compaq DL380 using (6) BD03663622
> drives.  Get to the point to configure the drives, and the machine states
> no disks available.  Tried installing older disk drives to mix an match,
> still did not find any of the drives.  If I install another OS (NT) on
> the box, I have no problems.

which disk controller are you using? the onboard RAID controller?

-- 
- bill fumerola / fumerola@yahoo-inc.com / billf@FreeBSD.org / billf@mu.org
- my anger management counselor can beat up your self-affirmation therapist
